prompt: Write a 400-word GTM playbook for openpatent.ai's first 90 days post Series A close. Cover: (1) the 3 ICPs in priority order — IP boutique law firms (5-40 attorneys, 12k firms in NA/EU, $148 ARPU), AI startups Seed-to-Series-B (8,500 firms, $48 ARPU growing to $999), gov/defense TTOs (480 offices, $1.2k-$4.9k ARPU), (2) the 4 GTM motions — (a) content-led SEO around 'AI idea theft' + 'defensive disclosure' + 'Bitcoin OTS timestamp' (target 100 ranking keywords in 90 days), (b) partnership channel through IP boutique associations (AIPLA, IPOEF, INTA), (c) outbound 10-segment sequence (already shipped in vault), (d) community-led dev relations around the 23+10 MCP tools and the BFT council public testnet, (3) the 5 paid-acquisition tests — Google Ads on 'provisional patent alternative' ($14 CAC target), LinkedIn ABM to IP Managing Partners ($120 CAC target), Twitter/X promoted threads ($8 CAC), podcast ads on IP Fridays + AI Breakdown ($22 CAC), retargeting via the verify.openpatent.ai pixel, (4) the 4 PLG loops — (a) free OTS self-serve tier ($10) viral-k factor 1.4, (b) verify.openpatent.ai public-page SEO, (c) BFT council public review log, (d) MCP tool directory listing, (5) the 90-day targets — 4,200 paying defensive customers, $625k MRR, 14% MoM growth, 38% gross-margin-on-acquisition. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {icps:[3 strings], gtm_motions:[4 strings], paid_tests:[5 strings], plg_loops:[4 strings], day_90_targets:[4 strings]}.
